case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR VS. EOS RESTAURANT, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR  STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT EOS RESTAURANT, INC. A CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR  STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER, CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR  STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EOS RESTAURANT, INC. A CORPORATION $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,500.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
